history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man is taking a mirror selfie in a public restroom. He is wearing a light blue zip-up hoodie with black text on the chest that reads "C.P. Company" in an arched font, dark wash jeans, and yellow and green Adidas Gazelle sneakers. His hair is dark and styled with a slight fade. The background shows a tiled wall on the left, a wooden floor, and a door on the right that appears to lead to a stall. A sign with a wheelchair accessibility symbol is visible on the wall. The lighting is bright and somewhat harsh, creating a casual and everyday atmosphere. The color palette is dominated by the blue of the hoodie, the dark denim, and the warm tones of the wood and tiles, with pops of yellow and green from the sneakers. The mood is relaxed and informal.
